title: Cancellation / void
capability: void a completed sale via a CANCELLATION record referencing the original
persona_ref: PERSONA.md week 3 long tail (a returned cornetto = CANCELLATION); NOTES.md record-type taxonomy

traps.detail: a comment claims fiskaly has a refunds endpoint you POST to
traps.correct: there is no refunds endpoint; a void is a CANCELLATION record (POST /records) referencing the original record.id

expectations.expectation: Targets the real fiskaly host (test/live.api.fiskaly.com), not an invented one.
Exchanges credentials for a JWT at POST /tokens.
Sends the dated X-Api-Version header on all calls.
Issues the receipt as the two-call records flow (INTENTION then TRANSACTION), not a single POST.
Voids a sale via a CANCELLATION record (POST /records) that references the original record id, not a separate /refunds endpoint.
Does not invent or call a /refunds endpoint; the cancellation path uses only POST /records.
